name: Federally Declared Disaster Tax Relief

eligibility.description: Taxpayers located in a federally declared disaster area, victims of significant fires, or those affected by terroristic or military actions.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a mandatory 120-day extension for tax acts and allows the Secretary to disregard up to 1 year for tax deadlines, interest, and penalties due to disasters, fires, or military actions.
